chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-629 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 8442/24 3.For hearing of main case 25-03-2025 M/s Muhammad Nasir Malik and Aneet Kumar Roopeja, Advocates for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Qadir Shaikh, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Statement already filed by the respondents No.4 to 6 reflects that entire arrears of the salaries of the petitioners have been released by the department and nothing remains outstanding; however, said statement has been controverted by the counsel for the petitioners. He submits that the petitioners have not yet received arrears of the salaries so also enhanced salaries, which requires evidence and it is well settled law that such exercise cannot be undertaken under writ jurisdiction. When confronted with such position, counsel for petitioners does not press this petition and submits that the petitioners will avail the alternate remedy, permissible under the law. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
